parameters.suspension_reason: Geolocation impossibility - device detected in NY and LA within 4 seconds, potential cloning/replay attack

expected_params.reason: Device menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigakan: geolocation impossibility (NY & LA dalam 4 saat) dan traffic spike 300%. Segera suspend untuk cegah aktiviti berterusan.

parameters.suspension_reason: Geolocation impossibility detected - device appeared in NY and LA within 4 seconds. Potential cloning or replay attack.

predicted_params.reason: High risk score (78/100) - Impossible geolocation detected. Device uplinks observed at Gateway GW-US-NY-01 and GW-US-LA-05 within 4-second window, indicating potential device cloning or replay attack. Immediate suspension required to prevent further fraudulent traffic.

expected_params.title: Device Cloning Suspect - dev-eui-1122334455667788 Geolocation Impossibility
expected_params.description: Device dev-eui-1122334455667788 menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigaka tinggi (risk score 78). Dikesan menghantar uplink di dua gateway berbeza (GW-US-NY-01 di New York dan GW-US-LA-05 di Los Angeles) dalam masa 4 saat - secara fizikal mustahil. Juga didapati traffic spike 300% berbanding baseline (142 uplink dalam 30 minit). Menunjukkan kemungkinan device cloning atau replay attack. Device telah disuspend segera.

initial_classification.notes: Geolocation impossibility + traffic anomaly strongly suggests device cloning or replay attack

predicted_params.title: Impossible Geolocation - Device Cloning Suspected
predicted_params.description: Device dev-eui-1122334455667788 flagged with HIGH risk score (78/100). Critical anomaly detected: Device uplinks observed at Gateway GW-US-NY-01 (New York) and GW-US-LA-05 (Los Angeles) within a 4-second window, which is physically impossible. This indicates potential device cloning or replay attack. Additional indicators: 300% increase in uplink message rate compared to baseline (142 uplinks in 30 minutes), no downlink traffic. Device has been suspended pending investigation.

initial_classification.notes: Geolocation impossibility strongly suggests cloned device or replay attack. Frame counter sequence appears valid but traffic pattern highly anomalous.

language_variants.subject: Scheduled Maintenance: Core Router Firmware Upgrade - US-EAST-04
language_variants.body: Dear Customer, This is to inform you of a scheduled maintenance activity that may affect your services. Maintenance Window: May 28, 2024, 02:00 - 04:00 UTC. We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

Affected Services: MPLS VPN, Dedicated Internet Access

expected_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
expected_params.description: 激活备用LSP L-NY-BOS-01-BKP 来分担主链路 R-NE-AGG-01 (HundredGigE0/2/0/5) 的拥塞流量。目标是将约20%的流量卸载到备用路径，以降低主链路利用率从94.5%降至约75%，从而改善延迟并满足SLA要求。

business_case.justification: 当前拥塞导致延迟42.8ms，超过SLA保证的20ms，存在违约风险和客户流失风险。激活备用LSP可快速缓解拥塞，恢复SLA合规性，避免潜在罚款和客户流失。

predicted_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
predicted_params.description: 通过激活备份LSP (L-NY-BOS-01-BKP) 分担主链路 R-NE-AGG-01 的负载，目标分流20%流量以缓解拥塞，降低延迟并满足SLA要求。

business_case.justification: 缓解关键拥塞热点，避免SLA违约风险。当前延迟42.8ms已超出SLA保证的20ms，影响15,420名用户（包括250家企业客户）。通过分流20%流量到备份链路，预计可降低延迟至25ms以内，减少客户流失风险并维护企业客户关系。
